evals.prompt: DATABRICKS_HOST và DATABRICKS_TOKEN đã có trong .env. Hãy upload experiments/DeepSeekServingEndpointStreaming.py, chạy nó bằng serverless Jobs, bắt buộc giữ catalog workspace, không in credential, rồi báo streaming có thật sự tạo nhiều delta hay không.
evals.expected_output: A safe authenticated workflow that uploads and runs the notebook on serverless compute and reports run IDs plus assertion-based streaming evidence without exposing secrets.
expectations: Checks credential presence without printing values
Verifies the exact workspace catalog before execution
Uses a serverless notebook task with no cluster definition
Reports terminal job state and concrete streaming delta evidence

evals.prompt: Notebook gọi serving_endpoints.create_and_wait bị timeout đúng 5 phút nhưng UI vài phút sau lại thấy endpoint. Hãy chẩn đoán và sửa workflow deploy; endpoint này đang tính phí nên đừng tạo trùng hoặc thay traffic ngoài ý muốn.
evals.expected_output: A control-plane diagnosis that distinguishes submission from readiness, recovers by name after timeout, waits long enough, preserves existing configuration, and avoids duplicate paid resources.
expectations: Explains that SDK endpoint methods return long-running waiters
Checks endpoint existence after timeout before retrying creation
Waits for NOT_UPDATING before a new update
Requires READY and active-config verification before querying

evals.prompt: ChatDatabricks stream không tool thì chạy, nhưng bind_tools qua ResponsesAgent lúc đầu báo schema không có name/parameters, sau đó DeepSeek V4 thinking lại báo không hỗ trợ tool_choice. Hãy sửa theo stack MLflow 3.14 + LangChain 1.x và chứng minh reasoning tool round-trip.
evals.expected_output: A modern ResponsesAgent fix that widens the runtime tools signature, omits DeepSeek tool_choice, preserves reasoning, and verifies a multi-turn tool continuation through ChatDatabricks.
expectations: Does not introduce legacy ChatModel or ChatAgent APIs
Widens only the ResponsesAgent tools input to accept full runtime tools
Omits tool_choice for DeepSeek V4 thinking mode
Tests tool call, tool output continuation, reasoning preservation, and multiple stream deltas
